explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.findings: Reports acknowledge investments in generative AI for operational capabilities and imply a structured approach to technology adoption and risk management. The company mentions the strategic utilization of AI for standardization and operational improvements, stating that this necessitates governance and policy for implementation. Furthermore, reports imply the existence of governance structures and policies to manage risks associated with AI investment and cybersecurity incidents.
governance.path_to_improvement: Name an AI governance body with defined mandate covering all AI use.

relevant_sources.summary: This Form 10-K filing from Nordstrom, Inc. provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The report supports governance by acknowledging investments in generative AI for operational capabilities, implying a structured approach to technology adoption and risk management. It also supports privacy by recognizing that advancements in AI may heighten the company's susceptibility to cyberattacks and privacy breaches, indicating an awareness of potential risks that necessitate oversight and control.
relevant_sources.title: Nordstrom, Inc. Form 10-K (filed March 19, 2024)

relevant_sources.summary: The Nordstrom 2025 10-K Annual Report (SEC Filing) provides evidence for the **governance** pillar of responsible AI. The report supports this by mentioning the strategic utilization of AI for standardization and operational improvements, which necessitates governance and policy for implementation. Furthermore, the disclosure of risks associated with AI investment and cybersecurity incidents implies the existence of governance structures and policies to manage these potential threats.
relevant_sources.title: Nordstrom 2025 10-K Annual Report (SEC Filing)

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: Reports recognize that advancements in AI may heighten the company's susceptibility to privacy breaches. This indicates an awareness of potential privacy risks that necessitate oversight and control.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: This Form 10-K filing from Nordstrom, Inc. provides evidence for the **governance** and **privacy** pillars of responsible AI. The report supports governance by acknowledging investments in generative AI for operational capabilities, implying a structured approach to technology adoption and risk management. It also supports privacy by recognizing that advancements in AI may heighten the company's susceptibility to cyberattacks and privacy breaches, indicating an awareness of potential risks that necessitate oversight and control.
relevant_sources.title: Nordstrom, Inc. Form 10-K (filed March 19, 2024)

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Based on 11 publicly available sources, Nordstrom's published materials address 2 of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars, specifically privacy and governance. Privacy disclosures recognize that advancements in AI may heighten the company's susceptibility to privacy breaches and indicate an awareness of potential privacy risks that necessitate oversight and control. Meanwhile, governance materials acknowledge investments in generative AI for operational capabilities and imply a structured approach to technology adoption and risk management related to generative AI. No qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars.
